## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore — tooling / CI / release

## Testing

- [ ] GUT suite passes locally (`godot --headless --path . -s addons/gut/gut_cmdln.gd -gconfig=.gutconfig.json`)
- [ ] New/changed scenes instantiate (scene-load smoke test)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the conventions in `AGENTS.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] No hardcoded gameplay constants (added to `Constants.gd` instead)
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated (README/CHANGELOG/design docs) where relevant
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages
